# Psalms 71

## Verses (24)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | In you, O Lord, have I put my hope; let me never be shamed. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Keep me safe in your righteousness, and come to my help; give ear to my voice, and be my saviour. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Be my strong Rock, the strong place of my salvation; for you are my Rock, and my safe place. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | O my God, take me out of the hand of the sinner, out of the hand of the evil and cruel man. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | For you are my hope, O Lord God; I have had faith in you from the time when I was young. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | You have been my support from the day of my birth; you took me out of my mother's body; my praise will be ever of you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | I am a wonder to all; but you are my strong tower. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | My mouth will be full of your praise and glory all the day. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | Do not give me up when I am old; be my help even when my strength is gone. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | For my haters are waiting secretly for me; and those who are watching for my soul are banded together in their evil designs, | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | Saying, God has given him up; go after him and take him, for he has no helper. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | O God, be not far from me; O my God, come quickly to my help. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | Let those who say evil against my soul be overcome and put to shame; let my haters be made low and have no honour. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | But I will go on ever hoping, and increasing in all your praise. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | My mouth will make clear your righteousness and your salvation all the day; for they are more than may be measured. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | I will give news of the great acts of the Lord God; my words will be of your righteousness, and of yours only. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | O God, you have been my teacher from the time when I was young; and I have been talking of your works of wonder even till now. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | Now when I am old and grey-headed, O God, give me not up; till I have made clear your strength to this generation, and your power to all those to come. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | Your righteousness, O God, is very high; you have done great things; O God, who is like you? | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | You, who have sent great and bitter troubles on me, will give me life again, lifting me up from the deep waters of the underworld. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | You will make me greater than before, and give me comfort on every side. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | I will give praise to you with instruments of music, O my God, for you are true; I will make songs to you with music, O Holy One of Israel. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | Joy will be on my lips when I make melody to you; and in my soul, to which you have given salvation. | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | My tongue will be talking of your righteousness all the day; for those whose purpose is to do me evil have been crushed and put to shame. | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
